to deposit (ignored if msg.value > 0 for ETH).","token":"ERC-20 token address (address(0) for native ETH)."}},"resolve(bytes32,uint8,bytes)":{"params":{"resolutionData":"ABI-encoded resolution details.","submissionId":"The submission being resolved.","verdict":"Application-specific verdict code (0 = undetermined)."}},"submit(bytes)":{"params":{"data":"ABI-encoded submission payload (format is application-specific)."},"returns":{"submissionId":"Unique identifier for this submission."}}},"title":"IERC8183 \u2014 Minimal Escrow & Evaluator Primitive","version":1},"userdoc":{"events":{"Deposited(address,address,uint256)":{"notice":"Emitted when funds are deposited into escrow."},"EvaluationRequested(bytes32,address,bytes)":{"notice":"Emitted when evaluation is requested for a submission."},"Resolved(bytes32,uint8,bytes)":{"notice":"Emitted when the evaluator renders a verdict."}},"kind":"user","methods":{"deposit(address,uint256)":{"notice":"Deposit funds into escrow. May be called once or incrementally."},"depositor()":{"notice":"Returns the address that deposited funds."},"escrowBalance()":{"notice":"Returns the current escrow balance."},"escrowToken()":{"notice":"Returns the escrow token address (address(0) for ETH)."},"evaluator()":{"notice":"Returns the address authorized to call resolve()."},"resolve(bytes32,uint8,bytes)":{"notice":"Called by the evaluator to render a verdict on a submission."},"status()":{"notice":"Returns the contract's current lifecycle status."},"submit(bytes)":{"notice":"Submit data for evaluation. Returns a unique submission ID."}},"notice":"A standard interface for contracts that lock value and release it         based on the verdict of an external evaluator (oracle). ERC-8183 deliberately stays minimal:   \u2022 One depositor locks funds for a specific purpose.   \u2022 One evaluator (oracle) is trusted to render a verdict.   \u2022 The contract maps verdicts \u2192 fund distribution. Extensions (partial payout, penalty tiers, resubmission, multi-party) are intentionally out of scope and should be layered on top.","version":1}},"settings":{"compilationTarget":{"src/IERC8183.sol":"IERC8183"},"evmVersion":"prague","libraries":{},"metadata":{"bytecodeHash":"ipfs"},"optimizer":{"enabled":false,"runs":200},"remappings":[":@openzeppelin/contracts/=lib/openzeppelin-contracts/contracts/",":erc4626-tests/=lib/openzeppelin-contracts/lib/erc4626-tests/",":forge-std/=lib/openzeppelin-contracts/lib/forge-std/src/",":halmos-cheatcodes/=lib/openzeppelin-contracts/lib/halmos-cheatcodes/src/",":openzeppelin-contracts/=lib/openzeppelin-contracts/"]},"sources":{"src/IERC8183.sol":{"keccak256":"0x9c3cf5f2c0fa011961c700b4bb937d2bab882379a411157e110a0c8dbda1f8b8","license":"MIT","urls":["bzz-raw://606ef07fa315b491491f8528b76d7ed358304ba9002e0440b3b5f5727c914d91","dweb:/ipfs/QmPEw2wnQwhX2zb49Wc2LggoJXCyFD2T9MD5tg1vZNfaeG"]}},"version":1}

params.amount: Amount to deposit (ignored if msg.value > 0 for ETH).
params.token: ERC-20 token address (address(0) for native ETH).

deposit(address,uint256).notice: Deposit funds into escrow. May be called once or incrementally.

depositor().notice: Returns the address that deposited funds.

escrowToken().notice: Returns the escrow token address (address(0) for ETH).

evaluator().notice: Returns the address authorized to call resolve().

resolve(bytes32,uint8,bytes).notice: Called by the evaluator to render a verdict on a submission.

status().notice: Returns the contract's current lifecycle status.

submit(bytes).notice: Submit data for evaluation. Returns a unique submission ID.
